mapper.insert:
insert into wecom_employee ( employee_id, id, gender, mobile, main_dept, telephone, avatar, follow, open_userid, crm_user_id, main_dept_nm, crt_tm, qr_code_url, thumb_avatar, name, bbk_yst_int_id, alias, position, email, status, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.employeeId}, #{item.id}, #{item.gender}, #{item.mobile}, #{item.mainDept}, #{item.telephone}, #{item.avatar}, #{item.follow}, #{item.openUserid}, #{item.crmUserId}, #{item.mainDeptNm}, #{item.crtTm}, #{item.qrCodeUrl}, #{item.thumbAvatar}, #{item.name}, #{item.bbkYstIntId}, #{item.alias}, #{item.position}, #{item.email}, #{item.status}, now(), now() )
on duplicate key update id = values(id), gender = values(gender), mobile = values(mobile), main_dept = values(main_dept), telephone = values(telephone), avatar = values(avatar), follow = values(follow), open_userid = values(open_userid), crm_user_id = values(crm_user_id), main_dept_nm = values(main_dept_nm), crt_tm = values(crt_tm), qr_code_url = values(qr_code_url), thumb_avatar = values(thumb_avatar), name = values(name), bbk_yst_int_id = values(bbk_yst_int_id), alias = values(alias), position = values(position), email = values(email), status = values(status), update_time = now()
mapper.select: select employee_id from wecom_employee where employee_id is not null and employee_id != ''
